name: @kite-vpn/engine
description: mihomo proxy engine + Nebula mesh engine (Go source, compiled to sidecars)

scripts.build: bash scripts/build.sh && bash scripts/build-nebula.sh && bash scripts/download-geodata.sh
scripts.build:current: bash scripts/build.sh current && bash scripts/build-nebula.sh current && bash scripts/download-geodata.sh
scripts.build:desktop: bash scripts/build.sh desktop && bash scripts/build-nebula.sh desktop && bash scripts/download-geodata.sh
scripts.build:all: bash scripts/build.sh && bash scripts/build-nebula.sh && bash scripts/download-geodata.sh
